visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a white lace dress and a navy blue beret stands in a supermarket aisle. She holds a plastic container of roast beef salad and smiles at the camera. The background shows a refrigerated display shelf filled with pre-packaged meals under bright, cool-toned artificial lights. (2) Close-up shot of several clear plastic containers of roast beef salad stacked on the shelf. Each container reveals thin slices of pink-toned roast beef, bright red cherry tomatoes, yellow orange segments, and dark raisins resting on a bed of green lettuce. (3) The woman points at the salad's price tag and informational label on the refrigerated shelf while maintaining an enthusiastic facial expression. The lighting is consistent and even. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor residential living room. Two women are seated at a wooden table. The woman on the left, wearing a black top, uses silver tongs to serve the salad onto a plate. (5) A close-up view of the salad on the plate shows the ingredients being tossed and drizzled with a light-colored dressing. The lighting is warmer than the supermarket scene. (6) Both women sit together at the table, looking towards the camera and giving enthusiastic thumbs-up gestures while smiling.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超級好吃! 新品黑馬 燒烤牛肉沙拉. (2) [Subtitle]: 最新的燒烤牛肉沙拉. (3) [Subtitle]: 他是用澳洲的牛肉. (4) [Subtitle]: 上面還有葡萄乾橘子跟小番茄. (5) [Subtitle]: 最重要的是醬都是特調的. (6) [Slogan]: $519/KG. (7) [Subtitle]: 他每一盒都落在370元左右. (8) [Subtitle]: 回去吃看看. (9) [Variety]: 你不買傻瓜. (10) [Subtitle]: 煙燻牛肉非常的入味. (11) [Variety]: 12萬分. (12) [Slogan]: 口感豐富 價格不貴. (13) [Subtitle]: 值得大家去購買.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in a beret and 1 friend in the eating scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a navy blue beret and a white floral lace sleeveless dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first part of the video is set inside a brightly lit Costco warehouse, specifically in the refrigerated food section with metal shelves. The second part is a home living room with a neutral-colored wall, a wooden table, and a sofa visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins narrating at a fast pace. Bright, upbeat electronic pop music with a steady 128 BPM beat starts immediately. (2) A synthetic 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a visual cut as the narrator describes the salad ingredients. (3) A 'ding' bell sound effect highlights the mention of the price. The narrator's tone remains consistently energetic and high-arousal. (4) A 'pop' sound effect is heard as the scene transitions to an indoor setting. The BGM remains continuous and maintains its rhythmic drive. (5) Fast-paced comic sound effects, including a whistle and a bounce, trigger during the eating demonstration to emphasize the humor and enjoyment of the speakers. (6) The video ends with a high-pitched exclamation from the narrator and a final synth flourish from the BGM.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy product review and recommendation for a new roast beef salad at Costco. It aims to inform viewers of the item's value, ingredients, and taste through a mix of on-site shopping footage and a home-based taste test.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While highly promotional of a specific Costco product, it lacks standard paid sponsorship indicators and appears as an organic creator review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The combination of fast visual cuts, high-frequency SFX, and high-energy narration identifies this as a typical social-media-native food vlog.
